step_rationale: Multidrug-resistance protein; miR-30a-5p target in gut-microbiota-MI axis; systemic metabolic regulator.
mechanism: ABCC1 suppression by miR-30a-5p dysregulates intracellular metabolite transport, linking dysbiosis to systemic MI risk.

references.title: The gut microbiotas with metabolites regulate the protective role of miR-30a-5p in myocardial infarction.
